name: Depths Society Golf
address: 2670 W John Beers Rd, Stevensville, MI 49127
about: Depths Society Golf is a high-tech golf simulator venue and underground society founded by Watermark Brewing Co. It combines a focus on serious golf practice with a social, community-oriented atmosphere. The venue emphasizes a ritualistic approach to golf, positioning itself as a sanctuary for dedicated players who value precision and mindset.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology provides detailed data analysis for serious practice
Integration with the Trackman app enhances the overall experience
A strong community-focused atmosphere for networking and connection
Emphasis on precision and mindset caters to dedicated golfers

food_and_drink.notes: Food service available, as indicated by kitchen amenities
Founded by a brewery (Watermark Brewing Co.) suggesting bar service

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar technology for ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but club rentals are available at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are available for purchase at the venue, with a full bar service provided.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A standard 18-hole round typically takes about 1-2 hours depending on simulator wait times.

faq.question: Is Depths Society Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Depths Society Golf is not specifically marketed as kid-friendly and appears to cater more to serious golfers and adults.
